resolvedQuestions.text: Full Aside CLI command surface (install, run, session, account, exec, repl, mcp)
Aside MCP server mechanics (transport stdio, invocation aside mcp, auth inherits account, tool set not enumerated in docs)
Auth/account model (multi-account, three provider tiers Aside/Subscription/API, sign-in required for built-in models)
Session/daemon model (resumable --session, task/permission modes, account-scoped persistent state)
Two-tier surface (NL agent + deterministic REPL); navigate/inspect/screenshot/download/multi-step/approval gating; console/network via REPL not named CLI commands
Aside = agentic+REPL+account/auth/permissions vs bdg = imperative CDP+local/no-auth; shared CLI-primary+MCP-fallback architecture
Exact JSON manual: name 'aside', call_template_type 'mcp', stdio, command 'aside', args ['mcp'], env {}; auth account-based not env-var
Full authoring checklist: SKILL.md mirroring mcp-chrome-devtools + INSTALL_GUIDE + references + scripts/install.sh + UTCP manual + mode-registry.json entry

keyFindings.text: CLI installed via curl script (releases.aside.com/install.sh), not npm; binary is 'aside'
Primary surface is natural-language agentic: aside "<prompt>" runs a browser agent
Sessions resumable via aside --session <id>; account-scoped persistent state
Multi-account model: aside account list/status/use + --account flag; built-in models need active sign-in
aside exec -m provider/model routes per-run model selection
aside repl gives deterministic JS browser automation (openTab, screenshots, downloads)
aside mcp runs an MCP server over stdio: command 'aside', args ['mcp']; mcp.json registration documented
Three provider tiers: Aside (built-in, needs sign-in), Subscription (OAuth), API (BYO key)
Permission modes Read-only/Guard(default)/Full-access; layered agent+session rules; Allow/Ask/Deny
Password autofill exists but raw values stay hidden from the agent
Two-tier surface: NL agent (aside '<prompt>') for goals + deterministic REPL (aside repl) for inspection/screenshots/downloads
console/network capture named as capabilities but exposed via REPL/NL, not named bdg-style CLI subcommands
Shared CLI-primary+MCP-fallback pattern with mcp-chrome-devtools; Aside adds agentic tier + auth + permission modes
UTCP manual: {name:'aside', call_template_type:'mcp', config.mcpServers.aside:{transport:stdio, command:'aside', args:['mcp'], env:{}}}
MCP tools resolve as aside.aside_<tool>; discover via search_tools/list_tools, never hardcode; wrap in try/finally
Packet = SKILL.md + INSTALL_GUIDE.md + references/{aside_cli_patterns,mcp_session_management,troubleshooting}.md + scripts/install.sh + UTCP manual + mode-registry.json

ruledOutDirections.reason: Documented installer is a curl script, not npm

promotedIdeas.text: MCP tool inventory for aside mcp is not in public docs; discover at runtime via Code Mode call_tool_chain / list_tools
